title: blechnum lineare
intro: Blechnum lineare, also known as the Chain Fern or Narrow Chain Fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is a native Australian plant that has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Blechnum lineare can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
